# Brainiall LLM Gateway

> OpenAI-compatible API gateway providing access to 113+ AI models from 17 providers via AWS Bedrock. 35-50% cheaper than direct API pricing.

## Base URL

https://apim-ai-apis.azure-api.net/v1

## Authentication

Use any one of: `Authorization: Bearer KEY`, `api-key: KEY`, or `Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key: KEY`

## Endpoints

- POST /v1/chat/completions — Chat completion (streaming supported)
- GET /v1/models — List available models

## Top Models

- claude-opus-4-6 ($5/$25 per MTok)
- claude-sonnet-4-6 ($3/$15 per MTok)
- claude-haiku-4-5 ($1/$5 per MTok)
- deepseek-r1 ($1.35/$5.40 per MTok)
- deepseek-v3 ($0.27/$1.10 per MTok)
- llama-3.3-70b ($0.72/$0.72 per MTok)
- nova-pro ($0.80/$3.20 per MTok)
- nova-micro ($0.035/$0.14 per MTok)
- mistral-large-3 ($2/$6 per MTok)

## Features

- OpenAI SDK compatible (Python, JavaScript, curl)
- Streaming (SSE)
- Tool/function calling
- Vision (image inputs)
- JSON mode / structured outputs
- 113+ models, 17 providers

## Links

- Documentation: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-llm-gateway
- Full docs: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-llm-gateway/blob/main/llms-full.txt
- Get API Key: https://brainiall.com
- Speech AI: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/speech-ai-examples
- NLP APIs: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-nlp-api
- Image APIs: https://github.com/fasuizu-br/brainiall-image-api
